Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY

UNDERGRADUATE APPROVED COURSES Course Numbering System The ﬁrst digit of the course number determines the level of the course, and the last two digits identify the course. Courses ending with the numeral 8 or 9 are the only courses that are repeatable for credit. Course levels are designated as follows:

BMGT - Business and Management (p. 60)

BMIN - General Business Minor (p. 70)

BSCI - Biological Sciences Program (p. 71)

BSCV - CIVICUS (p. 79) • BSOS - Behavioral and Social Sciences (p. 79)

BSST - Terrorism Studies (p. 81)

000-099: Non-credit courses
